Shaheen Afridi Sends Message Ahead of Pakistan–Sri Lanka Series

Nov 13, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Shaheen Afridi Sends Message Ahead of Pakistan–Sri Lanka Series

Pakistan’s spearhead Shaheen Afridi shared a motivational message ahead of the Pakistan–Sri Lanka series, expressing confidence in the team’s preparation and hunger to dominate the contest.
